title: Penalty for alleged late payment of property tax
detailed_summary: Infosys disclosed that Indore Nagar Nigam issued orders/actions for collection of a total penalty of INR 11,21,293 due to alleged late payment of property tax for FY2025-2026. The company stated there is no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities.

key_facts.fact: Indore Nagar Nigam levied a total penalty of INR 11,21,293 on Infosys.
The penalty was levied due to alleged late payment of property tax for FY2025-2026.
Infosys stated that there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.

litigation_or_regulatory_matters.description: Penalty levied due to alleged late payment of property tax for FY2025-2026.

important_text_spans.text: None, there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the company's stated lack of material business impact.
